classes: Arcane Trickster; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Throw a bubble of acid that damages each creature it hits.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Cleric; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Take only half the damage from Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing attacks.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Prevent the target from healing until your next turn. The target cannot help Downed characters. An undead target receives Disadvantage on Attack Roll Attack Rolls.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Strike with your weapon, afflicting your foe with a resonance that hurts them for 1d8 Thunder when they move. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced. Prerequisite Requires proficiency with the equipped weapon

classes: Arcane Trickster; Cleric; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Explode a corpse, causing it to impale those around it.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Illuminate a 9 m (30 ft) 9 m (30 ft) radius.
Conjure a beam of crackling energy. Deals 1d10 Force damage to a target.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Hurl a mote of fire.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Gain Advantage on Charisma Checks against a non- hostile creature. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced. Prerequisite In higher difficulty modes, the target might accuse you of enchanting them.
The target gains +1d4 bonus to Ability Check Ability Checks.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Cleric; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Infuse an object with an aura of light. Prerequisite Only affects one target at a time.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Create a spectral hand that can manipulate and interact with objects.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Create an illusion that compels nearby creatures to investigate. You can remain hidden while casting this spell. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Druid; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Project a puff of noxious gas, dealing 1d12 Poison to a target.

A flame in your hand sheds a light in a 9 m (30 ft) radius and deals 1d8 Fire damage when thrown. Throwing the flame immediately after you conjure it does not cost an Action. Extinguishing or throwing it on subsequent turns costs an action. The throw has a range of 9 m (30 ft).

classes: Arcane Trickster; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Reduces the target's Movement Speed by 3 m (10 ft).
Make a target more resistant to spell effects and conditions: it receives a +1d4 bonus to Saving Throw Saving Throws.
Engulf a target in a flame-like radiance.

Prerequisite Quarterstaff or Club Required. Your staff or club becomes magical: it deals 1d8 + Spellcasting modifier Bludgeoning damage, and uses your Spellcasting modifier for Attack Roll Attack Rolls.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: The target cannot use Reactions. This spell has Advantage on creatures with metal Armour.
Gain Advantage on Intimidation and Performance Checks.
Pulls the creature 3 m (10 ft) closer to you. Prerequisite The target cannot be pulled if it is Huge in size.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Cleric; Eldritch Knight; Warlock; Wizard
description: Ring the bell of impending doom. If the target is at full health, you deal 1d8 Necrotic damage instead.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Gain Advantage on your next Attack Roll. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced.
Insult a creature: it has Disadvantage on its next Attack Roll.

Convince a beast not to attack you. Prerequisite The creature must have an Intelligence of 3 or less. Prerequisite Condition ends early if you or an ally hurts the target. Prerequisite In higher difficulty modes, the target might become hostile when the spell ends.
Gain 5 temporary hit points 5 temporary hit points and deal 5 Cold damage to any creature that hits you with a melee attack. Prerequisite Can only have Temporary Hit Points from one source.
Prevent targets from using reactions.
Up to 3 creatures receive a -1d4 penalty to Attack Roll Attack Rolls and Saving Throw Saving Throws.
Bless up to 3 creatures. They gain a +1d4 bonus to Attack Roll Attack Rolls and Saving Throw Saving Throws.
Each flammable target is hit with 3d6 Fire damage.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Druid; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Charm a humanoid to prevent it from attacking you. You gain Advantage on Charisma Checks in dialogue. Enemies have Advantage on Saving Throw Saving Throws against being Charmed. Prerequisite Condition ends early if you or an ally hurts the target. Prerequisite In higher difficulty modes, the target might accuse you of enchanting them.
Hurl a sphere of energy. It deals 3d8 Thunder damage, or 2d8 Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning or Poison damage and creates a surface.
Blind creatures up to a combined 33 Hit Points.

Command a creature to flee, move closer, freeze, drop to the ground or drop its weapon. The target must succeed on a Wisdom Saving Throw Wisdom Saving Throw in order to resist the effects. Prerequisite No effect on undead.
Force an enemy to attack only you, giving it Disadvantage against other targets.
Choose to call forth rain or destroy a water-based surface.
Heal a creature you can touch. Prerequisite No effect on undead and constructs.
Magically change all aspects of your appearance.
Frighten a creature: they'll have Disadvantage on Ability Check Ability Checks and Attack Roll Attack Rolls and they cannot move.
Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Your weapons deal an additional 1d4 Radiant damage.
Triple a creature's Jumping distance.

Your attack summons thorny vines that possibly Ensnare your target. Ensnared creatures cannot move and take 1d6 Piercing damage at the start of each turn. An ally can use their Help action to try and tear away the vines.

Vines sprout from the ground, turning it into Difficult Terrain and possibly Entangling creatures within. Entangled creatures cannot move. An ally can use its help action to try and tear away the vines.
Gain Dash immediately and as a bonus action on each of your turns until this spell ends.
All targets within the light turn visible, and Attack Roll Attack Rolls against them have Advantage.
Bolster yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life to gain 7 temporary hit points 7 temporary hit points. Prerequisite Can only have temporary hit points from one source.
You and nearby allies gain Immunity to Falling damage.
Summon a familiar, a fey spirit that takes an animal form of your choosing
Create a cloud of dense fog to Heavily Obscure and Blind creatures within.

Conjure four magical berries for yourself or a companion. Creatures who eat a berry regain 1d4 Hit Points. Each berry counts as one Camp Supplies. The berries appear in the targeted creature's inventory and disappear after a Long Rest.
Cover the ground in flammable grease. It becomes Difficult Terrain and creatures within can fall Prone.
The next attack roll against this target has Advantage.

Shoot a volley of thorns. The thorns deal weapon damage to the target and then explode. The explosion deals an additional 1d10 Piercing damage to the target and surrounding creatures. On miss, the thorns still explode. On save, targets still take half damage from the explosion.
Heal a creature you can see. Prerequisite No effect on undead and constructs.
React to your next attacker with flames that deal 2d10 Fire damage. On a successful save, the target still takes half damage.
Make yourself or a target immune to Frightened and gain 5 Temporary Hit Points each turn. Prerequisite Can only have Temporary Hit Points from one source.

Make your attacks deal an additional 1d6 Necrotic damage to the target and give it Disadvantage on an Ability of your choosing. If the target dies before the spell ends, you can Reapply Hex to a new creature without expending a Spell Slot.

Mark a creature as your quarry to deal an additional 1d6 Weapon damage whenever you hit it with a weapon attack. If the target dies before the spell ends, you can use Reapply Hunter's Mark Reapply Hunter's Mark to mark a new creature.

Throw a shard of ice that deals 1d10 Piercing damage. It explodes and deals 2d6 Cold damage to anyone nearby. It leaves an Ice surface. On miss, the shard of ice still explodes. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced.
Putrefy a creature with Necrotic energy filling your hands.
Increase a creature's Movement Speed by 3 m (10 ft).

Surround an unarmoured creature in a protective magical force. Its Armour Class increases to 13 + its Dexterity modifier. This effect does not stack with Unarmoured Defence. Prerequisite The target can't be wearing Armour.
Create three darts of magical force, each dealing 1d4 + 1 Force damage to its target. The darts always hit their target, and can each be targeted individually.

classes: Cleric; Eldritch Knight; Paladin; Warlock; Wizard
description: Protect an ally against the attacks and powers of Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead. The targets can't be Charmed, Frightened, or possessed by them [ See: Bugs ], and when these creatures attack it, they have Disadvantage.
Possibly Poisons the target.

You or an ally cannot be targeted until you attack or harm a creature. You can still take damage from area spells. Until the affected entity attacks or harms another creature, it cannot be targeted by enemy attacks. However, it can still take damage from spells that influence a larger area.
Your weapon flares with white-hot intensity. It deals, on top of weapon damage, an extra 1d6 Fire damage and marks the target with Searing Smite.
When you are about to be hit by an enemy, use your Reaction to increase your Armour Class by 5. You also take no damage from Magic Missile. These effects last until the start of your next turn.
Surround a creature with a shimmering field of magic that increases its Armour Class by 2.
Put creatures into a magical slumber. Select targets up to a combined 24 Hit Points. Prerequisite The condition ends upon taking damage.
Gain the ability to comprehend and communicate with beasts.

Leave a creature Prone with laughter, without the ability to get up. Prerequisite The creature must have an Intelligence of 5 or more. Prerequisite The target can try to shake off the effect each time it takes damage.
Your melee weapon rings with thunder as you strike, pushing your target 3 m (10 ft) away and possibly knocking them Prone.

classes: Bard; Druid; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Wizard
description: Release a wave of thunderous force that pushes away all creatures and objects in an area, while also dealing Thunder damage.
Link yourself to a target with a bolt of lightning. Deal an additional 1d12 Lightning each turn by activating it.
Your weapon absorbs your wrath as you strike, possibly Frightening your target.
Bolster your allies with toughness and resolve to heal and increase their Hit Points maximum.
Close a door or container with a magical lock. It can no longer be lockpicked or opened with Knock.
Touch a willing creature to toughen its skin and increase its Armour Class up to 16.
Limit a foe's sight range. It is easier to hit, and the creature will miss more often. Attack Roll Attack Rolls against it have Advantage and the foe attacks with Disadvantage.
Attackers have Disadvantage on Attack Roll Attack Rolls against you. Doesn't affect creatures that don't rely on sight or that can see through illusions.
Your weapon gleams with astral radiance as you strike and possibly mark your targets with light, preventing it from turning Invisible.
Humanoids can't be Charmed, Frightened, or become enraged. [ See: Bugs ]
Conjure a cloud of spinning daggers that attack anyone inside.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Instil madness in a humanoid enemy, making them attack the creature closest to them (other than you), even if it's allied. At the end of each turn, the affected creature can make a Wisdom Saving Throw Wisdom Saving Throw to end this condition.
Create a cloud of magical darkness that Heavily Obscures and inflicts Blind to creatures within. Creatures cannot make ranged attacks into or out of it.
Grant a creature the ability to see in the dark out to a range of {12 m (40 ft).
Focus your mind to read the thoughts of certain creatures while talking to them.
Bestow a magical enchantment upon an ally. They gain Advantage on Ability Checks with a chosen Ability.
Make a creature larger or smaller. Either option has a duration of 10 turns. This affects their weapon damage and Strength Checks and Saving Throw Saving Throws.
Reduce a creature's peripheral vision and make it look at you.

Conjure a flaming Scimitar in your hand for 10 turns that deals 3d6 Fire damage. It sheds a bright light in a 3 m (10 ft) radius and a dim light in a 6 m (20 ft) radius. The blade can be unequipped and equipped again, but must stay on the spellcaster's person.

Summon a Flaming Sphere that deals 2d6 Fire damage to nearby enemies and objects. It also sheds bright light in a 6 m (20 ft) radius, and dim light for an additional 6 m (20 ft). You can move the sphere. You can remain hidden while casting this spell.
Summon a strong wind that clears all clouds. Any creatures caught in the gale who fail a Strength Saving Throw will be pushed back 5 m (17 ft) and be thrown Off Balance.

Cause a metal weapon or armour to glow red-hot and force the wearer to let go or receive Disadvantage on Attack Roll Attack Rolls and Ability Checks. If the creature is only wearing metal armour, it always receives Disadvantage. If the creature is still touching the metal, you can use a bonus action on subsequent turns to deal another 2d8 Fire and force the creature to let go or receive Disadvantage.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Cleric; Druid; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Hold a humanoid enemy still. They can't Move, Act, or React. Attacks from within 3 m (10 ft) are always Critical Hits. At the end of each turn, the affected creature can make a Wisdom Saving Throw Wisdom Saving Throw to end this condition.

classes: Arcane Trickster; Bard; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Touch a creature to turn it Invisible. Attacks against it have Disadvantage. It attacks with Advantage. Invisibility ends early if the invisible entity attacks, casts another spell, interacts with an object, takes an action or bonus action, or is damaged. [ See Notes ] Prerequisite Condition ends early if the creature attacks or casts a spell.
Unlock an object that is held shut by a mundane lock.
Cure a creature from Diseased, Poisoned, Paralysis, or Blinded.
Infuse a weapon with arcane energy. The weapon becomes magical, receiving a +1 bonus to Attack Roll Attack Rolls and Damage Rolls.

Shoot a green arrow that bursts in a spray of acid. Deals 4d4 Acid damage immediately and 2d4 Acid damage at the end of the target's next turn. If the spell misses, the target still takes half the initial damage, but no damage at the end of its next turn.
Create 3 illusory duplicates of yourself to distract attackers. Each duplicate increases your Armour Class by 3. Whenever you successfully evade an attack, one of the duplicates disappears.
Surrounded by silver mist, you teleport to an unoccupied space you can see.
Call down a beam of light that damages any creatures that enters the beam or starts its turn in the light. You can use an Action to move the beam 18 m (60 ft).
Call forth a veil of shadow and silence that gives you and nearby allies a +10 bonus to Stealth Check Stealth Checks.
Deal damage to a creature each turn. At the start of its turn, it takes Psychic damage. Each subsequent time it takes damage, the damage type of Phantasmal Force changes to match that damage type.
Heal all allies you can see within range. Prerequisite Can only be used outside of combat. Prerequisite No effect on undead and constructs.

Touch a creature to neutralise all poisons affecting it, and grant it protection against poisonous influences. Grants Advantage on Saving Throw Saving Throws against being Poisoned, and Resistance to Poison damage.
Weaken a foe: they deal half damage with weapon attacks using Strength.
Hurl 3 rays of fire. Each ray deals 2d6 Fire damage.
Become able to see Invisible creatures, and possibly reveal them to others.

Weave a shadowy shortsword in your hand that deals 2d8 Psychic damage. When you use the sword to attack a target that is in dim light or darkness, you make the Attack Roll with Advantage. The shadow blade can be unequipped and equipped again, but must remain on the spellcaster's person. [ See: Bugs ]

classes: Bard; Eldritch Knight; Sorcerer; Warlock; Wizard
description: Damages all nearby creatures and objects. Creatures made of inorganic material such as stone have Disadvantage on their Saving Throw.
Create a sound-proof sphere. All within are Silenced and Immune to Thunder damage. Prerequisite Using this spell might turn targets hostile.

Shape a piece of ground into hard spikes. A creature walking on the spikes takes 2d4 Piercing damage for every 1.5 m (5 ft) it moves. The spikes are Difficult Terrain, halving a creature's Movement Speed.
Summon a floating, spectral weapon that attacks your enemies alongside you.
Ward an ally. They gain resistance to all damage, and a +1 bonus to their Armour Class and Saving Throw Saving Throws.
Cover an area in thick, flammable webbing that can Enweb creatures within. An ally can use its Help action to try and tear away the webs.
Animate a corpse to create an undead servant while not in combat. Prerequisite The target must be a Medium or Small corpse.
Your allies will regain the maximum Hit Points possible when healed. They also gain Advantage on Wisdom Saving Throw Saving Throws and Death Saving Throws.

Curse a creature with your touch. The curse either bestows Disadvantage on Ability Check Ability Checks and Saving Throw Saving Throws, Disadvantage on Attack Roll Attack Rolls, lets you deal additional damage to the target, or robs it of its Actions. The effect of the curse is based on the variant selected and lasts for 10 turns.
Evoke a heavenly flare and possibly Blind your target

At the end of your turn, roll a d20. On 11 or higher, you vanish into the Ethereal Plane. While there, you can't be harmed or seen in this world. When you do vanish, your presence here is a representation of the location you'll come back to. You can choose to teleport it up to 6 m (20 ft). Warning Available only in combat.
Lightning strikes all targets within the area of effect for 3d10 Lightning damage. Then for 10 turns, you can call down lightning again without expending a spell slot.
Channel your weapon's essence into a destructive, widespread volley.

Try to stop a spell being cast. If it is higher level than the spell slot you used to Counterspell, you must make a check using your spellcasting ability [ See: Bugs ] to prevent it. The check's difficulty is equal to 10 plus the level of the spell you are trying to counter. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced.
Radiate a holy power that emboldens you and nearby allies. Their weapon attacks deal an additional 1d4 Radiant damage.
Enchant an item to shine like the sun or summon a sphere of sunlight that dispels all darkness around it. Items can only be enchanted with Daylight for 20 turns. [ See: Bugs ]
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +1 bonus to Attack Roll Attack Rolls and deals an additional 1d4 damage of your choice.

Hostile targets drop everything and become Fearful: they have Disadvantage on Ability Checks and Attack Rolls. If the target ends their turn where they can't see you, they can make another Saving Throw to shake off their fear.
Put an ally in a protective coma. They become Resistant to all damage except Psychic. Disease and poison no longer have any effect. Removed when Helped.
Shoot a bright flame from your fingers that explodes upon contact, torching everything in the vicinity for 8d6 Fire damage.

Transform yourself or an ally into a tiny gas cloud. It can't fall, and fits through small openings. It is very hard to damage. The cloud has Advantage on Constitution, Dexterity, and Strength Saving Throw Saving Throws. Prerequisite While transformed, the target won't be able to attack, cast spells, or talk.

Inscribe a circle of arcane glyphs on the ground. When stepped on by an enemy the selected magical effect will trigger. The glyph will last until triggered, or until a Long Rest. Prerequisite Only one glyph can be active at a time.
Bestow the ability to Fly upon yourself or an ally.

Target yourself or an ally to become Hastened. The creature has a +2 bonus to Armour Class, Advantage on Dexterity Saving Throw Saving Throws, its Movement Speed is doubled, and can take one additional Action per turn. Prerequisite When the condition ends, the creature becomes Lethargic.

Creatures within this black sphere are Blinded and take damage at the end of their turn and the start of their turn. Creatures starting their turn in the area take 2d6 Cold damage. Creatures ending their turn in the area possibly take 2d6 Acid damage. The area is Difficult Terrain.
Hypnotise creatures that can see the pattern. They cannot attack you. They cannot move nor act. This spell can be cast while you are Silenced.
After the arrow hits, smaller bolts snake out from the target towards nearby creatures.
Call forth a blast of lightning that hits all creatures in the line of the eruption.
Heal your nearby allies. Prerequisite No effect on undead and constructs.
Make weeds burst from the ground and smother the area. Creatures moving through the weeds have their Movement Speed quartered.
Touch a creature to grant it Resistance to Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder damage.
Touch a creature or object to remove all Curses and Hexes affecting it.
Revive a companion. They return to life with 1 hit point.

Call forth a storm that douses fire, creates an Ice surface, and forces spellcasters to succeed at a Concentration Saving Throw in order to maintain Concentration. Ice is a surface that is considered Difficult Terrain. Creatures moving through it have their Movement Speed halved, and will fall Prone on a failed Dexterity Saving Throw.
Alter time around up to 6 enemies to Slow them. They won't get far, they can't do much, and they're easier to hit.

Grant a semblance of life to a corpse, allowing it to answer questions. Skeletons and creatures killed with Acid, Fire, Lightning, Necrotic, Radiant damage no longer have a mouth and can't be made to talk using this spell. Doesn't work on Undead.

Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take 3d8 Radiant or 3d8 Necrotic damage per turn, and their Movement Speed is halved. Prerequisite Caster can't become Invisible while Concentrating on this spell.
Create a cloud of gas so nauseating it prevents creatures from taking actions.
Touch an enemy to siphon their life force and regain half as many Hit Points. For 10 turns, you can use Vampiric Touch again without expending an additional Spell Slot.
While this aura lasts, you can cast Restore Vitality as a Bonus Action to heal yourself or nearby allies by 2d6 Hit Points.
Temporarily Banish your target to another plane of existence.
Deals 8d8 Necrotic damage to a target. Plants take maximum damage from this spell, and have Disadvantage on the Saving Throw against it. Prerequisite No effect on undead and constructs.
Befuddle a group of creatures, causing them to attack at random, wander around aimlessly, and occasionally skip turns in the stupor.
Conjure a minor elemental to fight alongside you.
Conjure a dryad to fight alongside you. She can use Nature's Step, Entangle enemies, and Summon a wood woad.
Protect a creature from death. The next time damage would reduce it to 0 Hit Points, it remains conscious with 1 Hit Point left.
Teleport yourself and up to one adjacent ally to a place you can see. The ally cannot be larger than Medium.
Make a beast fight alongside you. Every time the Beast takes damage, it makes a Wisdom Saving Throw against your domination.
Tentacles sprout from the ground, turning the area into Difficult Terrain, attacking and Smothering creatures within.
Wreathe your body in flames that shed light in a 3 m (10 ft) radius, provide Resistance to Fire or Cold damage, and retaliate against melee attacks.

Snap an ally out of any Stun. Difficult Terrain can't slow them down, and they can't be magically Paralysed or Restrained. If the target is restrained by non-magical means, it can spend 1.5 m (5 ft) of Movement to free itself.
Summon a giant vine capable of dragging creatures toward itself.

Turn a creature Invisible. Attacks against it have Disadvantage. It attacks with Advantage. Invisibility breaks when you fail increasingly harder Stealth Check Stealth Checks on attacking, casting spells, or interacting with items.
Call forth a divine guardian that attacks nearby enemies. Every time it deals damage, the guardian loses an equal amount of Hit Points.

Impel a storm of hail and ice to crash from the sky, covering the ground and striking all objects and creatures within range, dealing Bludgeoning and Cold damage. It also creates an Ice surface that lasts 2 turns.

Enclose a target in a sphere of shimmering force, reducing its movement speed by half, and blocking all incoming and spell effects. The sphere reduces the target's movement speed by half, and also prevents it from casting spells or dealing damage. Prerequisite The target can't be Huge in size.
Haunt a creature with illusions of its greatest fears. It takes 4d10 Psychic Damage per turn, cannot move, has Disadvantage on Ability Checks and Attack Rolls
Transform a creature into a harmless sheep. If the sheep's Hit Points drop to 0, the target reverts to its original form with its original Hit Points.
Turn a creature's flesh hard as stone. It takes only half the damage of all non-magical Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Create a blazing wall of fire, Burning anyone who dares stand too close. Deals Fire to anything that moves into or ends its turn in the area.
Craft a large cloud that inflicts 5d8 Poison damage per turn. You can reposition the cloud every turn. The cloud Heavily Obscures everything within it.
Make a flurry of frost, crisp air, and condensed snow crystals erupt from your hands.
Bend the barrier between the Planes until they disgorge an elemental ally to follow and fight for you.

Poison a target and possibly afflict them with a disease of your choice. Once infected, the target will roll a Constitution Saving Throw each turn. If it accumulates 3 successes, it recovers. If it accumulates 3 failures, it contracts the disease chosen by the spellcaster.

Aberrations [ See: Bugs ], Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on Attack Roll Attack Rolls against you. You can also break Enchantments that Charm, Frighten, or Possesses allies.
Dominate a nearby humanoid. Allies are unaffected. Every time the creature takes damage, it may repeat the Saving Throw against your domination.
Make a pillar of divine fire roar down from the heavens like the wrath of affronted angels.
Touch a creature and negate any Charm, Petrification, Stun, or Curse.
Paralyse a creature. It can't move, act, or react. Attacks from within 3 m (10 ft) are always critical hits. Prerequisite No effect on undead.
Locusts attack everyone within range, make the area Difficult Terrain, and impose Disadvantage on Perception Checks.
Unleash a soothing hum of energy that heals you and nearby allies. Prerequisite No effect on Undead and Constructs
Target an otherworldly creature and attach its consciousness to your own. It will follow and fight for you as an ally. Prerequisite Target must be a Celestial, Elemental, Fey, or a Fiend.
Disguise up to 4 members of your adventuring party.
Throw a creature or object up to 18 m (60 ft) with a thought. Once per turn, you can use Telekinesis again without expending a Spell Slot. Heavier items deal more damage.

Raise a wall of non-magical, solid stone. The wall can be created between any two points within range as long as there is a clear path between them. It is made up of Stone Pillars with 30 HP each, immune to Psychic and vulnerable to Force and Thunder damage. Pillars block movement and line of sight.
Create two linked teleportation portals within range. All creatures, including enemies, may travel between the two portals as a free action.
Summons a wall of razor-sharp blades that turns the area into Difficult Terrain and damages anyone foolish enough to come close.
Strike an enemy with lightning. Three more bolts will leap from the target, electrifying as many as three other enemies within range.
Sculpt a massive sphere of entropic energy around a creature. Devastate the target and all surrounding creatures.
Create a corpse as a heinous mummy that fights by your side. Prerequisite The target must be a Medium or Small corpse.
If the target fails a Dexterity Saving Throw, and the spell reduces it to 0 hit points, it disintegrates into a crumbly ash.

Your eyes become black corridors walled in teeth, your gaze capable of inflicting dread, sickness, or putting creatures to sleep. While Concentrating, you may cast Eyebite without expending a spell slot.
Atrophy a foe, Restraining them until they temporarily turn to stone. The target will Petrify if it does not succeed its Saving Throw within 3 turns. [ See Notes ]
Create a barrier that makes creatures and objects inside it immune to all damage.
Reduce a target's maximum Hit Points, but never below 1.
Heals a target's wounds and remove Blindness and any diseases. Prerequisite No effect on undead and constructs.
You and everyone around can't be Poisoned, Diseased, or Frightened (status group). Everyone's maximum Hit Points increases by 12, and they make Wisdom Saving Throw Saving Throws with Advantage.
Create a ball of churning ice that can be launched instantly to generate a frosty explosion or stored for later use.

Cause a creature to start dancing, making it unable to take Actions or Move. Its attackers have Advantage on Attack Roll Attack Rolls. The dancer has Disadvantage on Attack Rolls and Dexterity Saving Throw Saving Throws.
Beseech one of these otherworldly entities for aid. Summon either an Elemental, Celestial, or Fiend to fight for you.
A beam of brilliant light sears and Blinds all creatures in its path. Until the spell ends, you can recast Sunbeam without expending a spell slot.
Raise a wall of solid ice that deals 10d6 Cold damage to anyone standing in its way. When the ice is broken, it leaves behind a cloud of frigid air that deals 10d6 Cold per turn to creatures within.
Create a wall of pliable, twisting thorns surrounded by Entangling vines. Creatures can move through the wall, but take 7d8 Piercing damage per turn, their Movement Speed is quartered.

Transform yourself and all nearby party members into tiny clouds of mist to avoid attacks. You become Resistant to non-magical damage, gain Advantage on Constitution, Dexterity, and Strength Saving Throw Saving Throws, and become Tiny in size. Prerequisite While transformed, you won't be able to attack, cast spells, or talk.
